title: Eralam
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Eralam.png|thumb|right|Eralam]]
'''Eralam''' was a type of [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|lightsaber crystal]] once [[Mining/Legends|mined]] on the third [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Erai]], though orbital bombardments by ancient [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] forces against the moon made them very rare. If they could be found, Eralam crystals produced a clear, superior [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] beam. Its mineral form was known as '''eraladium'''.

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', the crystal is listed as having +2 attack and +2 damage.
